name: PAYOMATIC
description_short: PAYOMATIC is New York's largest check-cashing and financial services provider with nearly 140 stores across NYC and surrounding areas, offering check cashing, money transfers, bill pay, and prepaid cards.
description_long:
PAYOMATIC operates as a neighborhood financial services chain primarily serving the New York metropolitan area, including the Bronx, Brooklyn, Manhattan, Queens, and Long Island. The company has built its reputation on providing accessible check-cashing services and related financial products to underbanked consumers and business owners who need quick cash access without traditional banking requirements.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of services including standard check cashing (payroll, government, tax checks), business check cashing with competitive rates and same-day payouts, Western Union money transfers to over 200 countries, money orders, bill payment services (over 100 companies supported including utilities and credit cards), the inPOWER prepaid Mastercard with mobile app access, prepaid mobile top-ups, and direct deposit services. Their business check-cashing service specifically targets small business owners needing immediate access to funds for supplies, payroll, and operational expenses.

PAYOMATIC distinguishes itself through its extensive store network (nearly 140-150 locations across NYC), positioning as the largest Western Union agent in New York, and offering same-day large payouts for business checks. They emphasize quick processing with no holding periods on standard checks, extended store hours (8 AM-10 PM Friday, 10 AM-6 PM daily minimum), and a branded prepaid card product (inPOWER) exclusive to their stores. The mobile app provides 24/7 account access for cardholders.

As a check-cashing service, PAYOMATIC serves a legitimate financial function for unbanked and underbanked populations but does not disclose fee structures on their website. While they offer faster cash access than banks and competitive rates for business checks, consumers should understand that check-cashing fees vary and may be higher than traditional bank deposits. The company is best suited for those who need immediate cash access and those operating small businesses requiring quick check liquidation.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Nearly 140 stores across NYC neighborhoods providing convenient physical access
No holding periods on check cashing — receive cash immediately
Business check-cashing service with competitive rates, generous limits, and same-day large payouts
Largest Western Union agent in New York with ability to send money to 200+ countries
Extended store hours (8 AM-10 PM on weekdays, 10 AM-6 PM minimum daily) for accessibility
Exclusive inPOWER prepaid Mastercard with 24/7 mobile app access
Multiple payment options including 100+ bill pay companies (utilities, credit cards, rent)
cons: Website does not disclose check-cashing fee structure or rates, making cost comparison difficult
Limited to New York metropolitan area — not available nationally
Check-cashing fees and prepaid card fees likely higher than traditional bank services
inPOWER card availability limited to PAYOMATIC stores only, reducing portability
No mention of fraud protection, FDIC insurance, or regulatory oversight details
best_for: Small business owners needing quick same-day payouts for business checks
Unbanked and underbanked NYC residents without access to traditional bank accounts
Individuals sending money internationally through Western Union
Those needing bill payment services for utilities and credit cards without a bank account
diagnosis: PAYOMATIC is best for NYC-area residents and small business owners who need immediate cash access without a bank account or who require same-day business check payouts. The main caveat is that check-cashing fees are not disclosed on their website, and consumers should expect to pay fees significantly higher than bank check deposits, making traditional banking a cheaper option if available.
services: Business check cashing with same-day payouts
Western Union money transfers (send and receive)
Western Union prepaid top-ups and reloading
Bill payment (100+ companies including Con Edison, NYCHA, Verizon, Spectrum)
inPOWER prepaid Mastercard with mobile app
Bank debit and prepaid card loading
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 303 E Houston St, New York, NY 10002
